Our specialized pantry pest control service targets these kitchen invaders at every life stage, from eggs to adults, ensuring complete elimination. We serve all of East Harlem, from pre-war walk-ups to newer developments, with treatments designed for the unique challenges of Manhattan living.

Our technicians understand the specific challenges of treating compact Manhattan kitchens and use safe, food-grade products that eliminate pests without contaminating your pantry items.

faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in East Harlem apartments?
faqs.answer: The most common pantry pests we treat in East Harlem are Indian meal moths, flour beetles, grain weevils, and cigarette beetles. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, rice, spices, and dried fruits. They can enter through contaminated groceries or migrate from neighboring apartments in multi-unit buildings.

faqs.question: How much does pantry pest control cost in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: Our pantry pest control service in East Harlem ranges from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation and the size of your kitchen. This includes a thorough inspection, treatment of all affected areas, removal guidance, and prevention recommendations. Follow-up visits are available if needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do I need to throw away all my food if I have pantry pests?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily all food, but you will need to discard any open or infested packages. Our technician will help you identify which items are compromised during the inspection. Sealed, unopened items in glass, metal, or thick plastic containers are usually safe. We'll provide detailed guidance on what to keep and what to discard, plus tips on proper food storage to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pantry pest control service in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most East Harlem locations, understanding that pantry pests multiply quickly and contaminate food supplies. Our technicians serve the entire neighborhood from East 96th Street to East 142nd Street. Call us in the morning, and we can often have a technician at your door within hours to assess and treat your pantry pest problem.
